Platinum Equity.description: Founded in 1995 by Tom Gores, Platinum Equity is a global investment firm with approximately ~$48 billion of assets under management and a portfolio of approximately 60 operating companies that serve customers around the world. Platinum Equity specializes in mergers, acquisitions and operations – a trademarked strategy it calls M&A&O® – acquiring and operating companies in a broad range of business markets, including manufacturing, distribution, transportation and logistics, equipment rental, metals services, media and entertainment, technology, telecommunications and other industries. Over the past 30+ years Platinum Equity has completed more than 550 acquisitions.
Platinum Equity.specialties: ['Private Equity, Mergers and Acquisitions, M&A, M&A&O, Public-to-Private Transactions, Corporate Divestitures, and Complex Carveouts']

Demand Logic.description:
Demand Logic is a multi-award winning building optimisation platform which provides live data intelligence on how a building operates. The Demand Logic platform delivers actionable insights and quantifiable benefits in a short space of time to make the management of buildings easier, with clients seeing a return on their investment within the first few months.

High performance building management teams use the Demand Logic platform to:

✔ Save energy used in their buildings & reduce carbon emissions
✔ Reduce the cost of maintaining their heating, ventilation and cooling assets
✔ Increase the comfort and well-being of building users

There's a Demand Logic product option for every building. We can unlock data from any source, ranging from newly installed or existing sensors, IAQ & metering, to tens of thousands plant-related data points available in a Building Management System (BMS).

We’re on a mission to decarbonise the built world and make buildings work properly.

To learn more, book a demo today: https://www.demandlogic.co.uk/request-a-demo
Demand Logic.specialties: ['Smart Buildings, Building Optimisation, PropTech, CleanTech, Property Management, Facilities Management, and Data Analysis']

Moonpig.description:
At Moonpig Group our mission is to help people connect and create moments that matter. 

We’re an international group made up of two brilliant brands – Moonpig in the UK, US and Australia, and Greetz in the Netherlands.

We’re a technology platform at heart, but our customers know us as the leading eCommerce destination for greetings cards, gifts and flowers. Last year we delivered over 70 million personalised cards, gifts and flower bouquets in over 50 million orders, helping our customers celebrate all the occasions that matter to them, from milestone birthdays and anniversaries to new arrivals and all of those just-becauses.

We have awesome people and a caring company culture: We give teams autonomy while supporting personal growth at all levels. Plus, we know how to have fun! Don’t just take our word for it, though; in Feb 2022,  Moonpig was officially recognised as an outstanding company to work for by Best Companies and we earned a 2-Star accreditation, which is Best Companies second-highest standard of workplace engagement and represents organizations striving for the top. 

Head over to our careers site for more company info and our current opportunities - https://www.moonpig.com/uk/blog/moonpig-careers/moonpig-careers/
Moonpig.specialties: ['Retail, eCommerce, Internet, Printing, Greeting cards, Flowers, and Chocolates']

Hartley Botanic.description: Hartley Botanic is the leading global manufacturer of handmade Victorian glasshouses. Founded in 1938, Hartley specializes in handmade English greenhouses that last the test of time.

Bridgepoint.description:
Bridgepoint Group is one of the world's leading mid-market investors, specialising in private equity, infrastructure, credit, secondaries and private wealth.

With $98 billion of assets under management and a strong local presence in Europe, North America and Asia, we combine global scale with local market insight and sector expertise, consistently delivering strong returns through cycles.

Whiffle.description: Whiffle is revolutionizing numerical weather prediction by using cutting-edge computing technology to run the world's highest resolution operational weather model. Our technology has the potential to deliver benefits in many economic sectors, but our primary focus has been on the renewable energy market. Our innovative weather model enables sustainable energy production that is more predictable and is therefore of direct value to customers in the electricity sector by reducing the costs of weather risks.
Whiffle.specialties: ['wind resource assessments, energy yield modelling, precision weather forecasting, solar resource assessments, atmospheric modelling, and air quality']

Mous.description:
We are Mous. (Pronounced “mouse,” not “moose.”)

People deserve gear that performs and empowers them to live fully. That’s why we create premium, utilitarian products designed for uncompromising performance and proven to survive the extremes.

Every Mous product is engineered from first principles, tested relentlessly, and built to be trusted when it matters most. From everyday life to extreme adventures, our gear keeps up so you can live without limits.

Our journey began with a simple belief: consumers should never have to compromise. To prove it, we immersed ourselves in the craft, moving to China, working tirelessly, and learning everything we could. In 2017, we launched our first Limitless Phone Case, raising $2.5 million in pre-orders and setting the tone for our pursuit of excellence.

Since then, we have invested over £5 million in research and development, building in-house expertise and iterating to push the boundaries of performance. We have engineered phone cases, magnetic accessory ecosystems, mechanical mounts, ultra-fast wireless chargers, water and impact resistant backpacks, MacBook sleeves, and luggage, all designed to solve real problems and empower our customers.

From commutes to wild adventures, Mous products remove frustrations, extend experiences, and enable people to live without limits. Whether scaling a mountain, commuting across the city, or navigating your day, Mous helps you stay at your best.

We don’t just create products, we enable experiences. With Mous, the only limit is your imagination.

Mous. Live without limits.
www.mous.co | @mouscase
Mous.specialties: ['Product Design, Engineering, Retail, D2C, E-Commerce, and Consumer Goods']

Tenzo.description: Tenzo brings together data from all your technologies in real time, from POS to inventory management, from software to labour schedulers. Allowing restaurant operators, from Head Office to General Managers, to supercharge their restaurant's performance. Enabling better collaboration between team members, predicting sales, improving performance, hitting KPIs as well as accurately knowing what that means for labour and inventory. Remove the guesswork and never be understaffed or overstaffed again and say goodbye to food wastage. Empowering you to act and improve performance. All the time. Helping your restaurant thrive.
Tenzo.specialties: ['Retail analytics, Big data, Actionable business insight, Restaurants, Forecasting, Aggregator, Business Intelligence, Retail, Hospitality, predictive restaurant operation, and hospitality analytics']

Piper.description:
We are the investor-partner of choice for ambitious founders growing brand legends that make people’s lives healthier, happier, and more fulfilling, while helping them minimise their impact on the environment. This is our purpose.

We invest in fast growing brands with sales of £5-50m. 

Started by founders, we are still a mix of founders, investors, brand strategists, digital innovators, talent and culture experts who have helped more than 50 brands become disruptive leaders across 70 countries, growing digital sales by over £500m and opened more than 350 stores, restaurants and bars.
 
Our team of experts alongside our global community of brand leaders help our partner brands navigate their growth challenges and fast-shifting changes in consumer behaviour. Our invite-only skills-sharing Founders’ Collectives and Geekmeets are attended by hundreds of the most innovative brands every year.

Investments past and present include:
Ancient + Brave
Be At One
Barking Heads
Bloom & Wild
Boden
Borough Broth
Bottlegreen
Bruce's Doggy Day Care

Thortful.description: Unique designs by 6000+ independent creators | Printed on demand in Sheffield using vegan ink (yes that’s a thing.) 100% recyclable, 0% thortless 💌♻️🧡
Thortful.specialties: ['greeting cards, cards, marketplace, art, design, illustration, technology, events and occasions, inspiration, creative solutions, gifts, and flowers']

Optibus.description:
Optibus’ vision is to be the modern operating system for mass transportation. 

Optibus is an end-to-end, cross-functional software platform for transportation planning, scheduling, rostering, and operations.

Founded in 2014, transportation agencies and operators in over 7,000 cities worldwide trust Optibus to increase efficiency and ridership, improve service quality, promote transportation equity, reduce emissions and costs, and modernize their operations. Our platform enables operators and agencies to plan and analyze better routes, schedules, rosters, and much more.

Optibus is a cloud-native solution powered by artificial intelligence (AI) and advanced optimization algorithms that are revolutionizing the transportation industry across the globe. Optibus has been recognized as a technology pioneer by the World Economic Forum for its role in transforming the transportation industry, promoting equity, sustainability, and smart cities. Learn more: www.optibus.com
Optibus.specialties: ['Transportation planning, Transportation optimization, Real-time scheduling, Mass transit, Transportation, Mobility, Public transport, AI, Algorithms, and Cloud computing']

Epiris.description:
Epiris  invests in opportunities to transform and reposition businesses in partnership with exceptional management teams. We target control positions in UK-centric businesses with an enterprise value of between £75 million and £500 million. Over the past 25 years we have invested more than £5 billion in over 200 deals.

To find out more about Epiris please visit our website: www.epiris.co.uk

Ares.description:
Ares Management Corporation (NYSE: ARES) is a leading global alternative investment manager offering clients complementary primary and secondary investment solutions across the credit, private equity, real estate and infrastructure asset classes. We seek to provide flexible capital to support businesses and create value for our stakeholders and within our communities. By collaborating across our investment groups, we aim to generate consistent and attractive investment returns throughout market cycles. As of March 31, 2026, Ares Management Corporation's global platform had approximately $644 billion of assets under management with approximately 4,400 employees operating across North America, South America, Europe, Asia Pacific and the Middle East.

Cybersecurity & Fraud Prevention: https://www.aresmgmt.com/fraud-awareness
Ares.specialties: ['Private Equity, Credit, Real Estate, Strategic Initiatives, Alternative Asset Management, Financial Services, Investment Management, and Direct Lending']

Curam Care.description:
Curam is the UK’s largest  digital care provider, connecting families with over 10,000 vetted, DBS-checked professional carers across the UK and Ireland. Available 24/7, our digital platform allows those in need of care to find carers in real time, filter by skills or experience, and message them directly.

Our features like CuramMeet video calls and FamilyCircle updates allow families to meet carers before hiring and stay informed every step of the way. Curam Care Professionals have an average of 10 years’ care experience, and our technology ensures that both those searching for care and our carers are kept safe and secure.

Curam offers both self-managed and CQC-regulated managed care packages, giving families flexibility and peace of mind. With the lowest fees in the sector and over 6.5 million care hours already delivered, we’re transforming how people find and manage quality home care.

Find a carer today 👉  www.curamcare.com or start your care journey by downloading our app ➡️ https://www.curamcare.com/apps-download/client ​

TDR.description: TDR is a leading private equity firm with over €16 billion of assets under management and typically invests in strong European companies that are leaders in their markets. TDR has a 24-year track-record of working collaboratively with portfolio company management teams to deliver on a shared vision for growth and value creation, leveraging its investment, operational and data science expertise. TDR not only invests capital in portfolio companies, but also provides expert team resources to help bring about sustainable, positive and transformational change within its businesses.

Trainline.description:
Trainline is proud to be Europe's leading rail and coach platform - a tech company with a mission to make train travel as smooth as possible to allow travellers to make greener travel choices. 

We bring together millions of routes, fares and journey times from more than 270 rail and coach carriers across 45 countries in Europe and beyond. That's £5.9 billion in ticket sales annually, and +125 million visits to our apps and websites each month from users seamlessly booking and managing their journeys through our website or mobile app and via our B2B partner channels. We offer our customers the best price for their journey and smart, real-time travel information on the go.  

Our smart technology and data-driven features help our customers to stay one step ahead. We aim to make rail and coach travel easier and more accessible. The environment is fundamental to our purpose - through our technology, and data, we make rail travel easier, inspiring people to make travel choices that are better for the environment.
Trainline.specialties: ['Online Train Tickets, Online rail bookings, Passenger Rail Ticketing, Travel Distribution Technology, Global Rail Access, Rail Booking Systems (Software Development), eTicketing for Rail, Online Coach Tickets, Rail Passes, Travel App, and Railcards']

Wattbike.description:
Wattbike was born more than 20 years ago with a single vision – to improve the health and performance of every athlete in the world by creating the ultimate training tool.

The first Wattbike was developed in partnership with British Cycling in 2008. That same year, Team GB won 60% of the cycling gold medals at the Beijing Olympics. 
Word soon spread about how Wattbikes were transforming fitness and performance measurement and they soon became a non-negotiable for elite clubs.

You’ll now find Wattbikes all over the world from the changing room of the All Blacks to global health and fitness clubs, medical facilities, universities, the military and in the home.

Every athlete has a goal and we make sure you're ready to perform for the moment that matters.

IVU.description: IVU Traffic Technologies has been developing integrated IT systems for an efficient and environmentally friendly public transport for 50 years with more than 1,000 experts. The standard products of the IVU.suite map all processes of bus and rail companies: from planning, dispatch, fleet management, ticketing, and passenger information through to the settlement of transport contracts. In close partnership with our customers, we lead demanding IT projects to success and therefore ensure reliable mobility in the metropolises of the world.
IVU.specialties: ['Software, Hardware, Public Transport, IT solutions, Scheduling, Dispatching, Fleet management, Ticketing, Realtime Passenger Information, Controlling, IVU.suite, IVU.rail, Mobility, IVU.data, Planning, IT Systems, Mobility, and KI']

Get Licensed.description:
Get Licensed is the UK's leading provider of security training, screening, and staffing solutions.

We help people get licensed and find security jobs with top employers through our integrated platform. With accessible, affordable, and high-quality training courses across multiple convenient locations, we've helped over 400,000 people launch successful security careers.

Our mission: To make our world a safer place by connecting qualified security professionals with the employers who need them.
Get Licensed.specialties: ['Security, Door Supervisor, CCTV, First Aid, Personal Licence, Recruitment, SIA Licence, Temporary Cover, Licensing, Security Training, Job Board, Find Work, License, Close Protection, Security Industry, APLH, Security Guard, training, Employment, Staffing, BS7858, Vetting, SIA licence training, and Hire security']

Turnit.description:
Turnit is a travel tech company with more than 20 years of industry experience. We provide mission-critical software technology and consultation to ground-based passenger transport operators. 

Turnit Ride is a comprehensive SaaS platform targeted for operators who require complex route network management, dynamic pricing, and flexible responsiveness to the market situation, maximizing their revenue while streamlining their business processes. 

The platform, delivered as full service, processes more than 20 million passenger segments annually and its services are used by over 40 operators in Europe, Northern America and Africa, including industry leaders such as Vy Group, LTG Link, Bus Eireann, CTM, Lux Express etc
Turnit.specialties: ['Electronic ticketing, Passenger information, Software technology, Transit ticketing, Travel Technology, Reservation System, Inventory Management System, Rail Technology, and Intercity Bus']

Ticketer.description:
Ticketer is the UK’s leading provider of automatic vehicle location data, real-time information, fleet management and ticketing solutions. 

Ticketer partners closely with franchising authorities, local and transport authorities, and commercial bus and coach operators alike, to provide optimised public transport and effortless passenger experiences.

Lovehoney.description:
Founded in August 2021, Lovehoney Group (LHG) brings together two of the sexual wellness industry’s market-leading brands, WOW Tech and Lovehoney. Swiss brand Amorana, acquired by Lovehoney in 2020, and Belisoft, acquired in 2022 also join LHG.

LHG is home to more than 650 highly trained professionals from over 25 nations, located in nine offices across the world with a broad spectrum of talents across engineering, industrial design, sales, and marketing.

LHG will continue to provide best-in-class brands and truly innovative and high-quality products to its B2B retail partners and consumer websites.

Vivobarefoot.description:
Founded in 2012 by two seventh-generation cobblers, Galahad and Asher Clark, Vivobarefoot is based on one simple insight - barefoot footwear is sustainable footwear. 

A Vivobarefoot product or experience is one that literally brings us closer to nature - regenerating our physical, social and spiritual health and the natural world.

We believe:
The closer people are to nature, the more they will protect it.
The natural world is the only real model of sustainability.
Barefoot shoes are the only shoes that are healthy for us and the planet.
Vivobarefoot.specialties: ['Barefoot footwear, minimilist footwear, running coaching, ecofriendly footwear, regenerative business, and materials research']

Sqills.description:
Sqills empowers passenger transport operators through their mission-critical software platform, S3 Passenger. 

This dynamic pricing, inventory management, and reservation platform makes it possible for transport operators to offer their passengers a seamless travel experience. From booking the ticket through every step of the journey. 

We help with moving people forward.
Sqills.specialties: ['Reservation software, rail software, ferry software, Bus software, Dynamic pricing software, Booking software, and Ticketing software']

Tenzing.description:
At Tenzing, we're not just investors; we're partners on a mission. As a leading private equity firm specialising in high-growth UK and European SMEs valued up to £300 million, we're passionate about collaborating with niche market leaders and visionary challenger businesses. Our goal? To empower these companies to transform themselves and disrupt their markets.

Our namesake, Tenzing Norgay, the legendary Nepalese mountaineer who guided Sir Edmund Hillary on the historic first ascent of Mount Everest, symbolizes our unwavering commitment to guiding our portfolio businesses to the summit of their ambitions, time and time again. Just as Tenzing guided Hillary through uncharted territories, we stand by your side as you navigate the complex landscape of business growth.

What Sets Us Apart:

* Passion for Partnership: We thrive on partnering with high-energy, high-performance management teams. We're not passive bystanders; we're active collaborators who roll up our sleeves alongside you to drive growth and create lasting value.
* Shared Wisdom: Our journey has been marked by invaluable experiences, and we're eager to share those insights with you. Whether it's navigating financial challenges or seizing market opportunities, we're here to support, inspire, and guide you every step of the way.
* Real-World Expertise: Our team isn't just well-versed in finance; we've walked in your shoes. We understand the unique demands and pressures faced by management teams, and we bring real-world expertise to the table.

If you're a high-energy, high-performance management team with big dreams and the determination to reach them, we invite you to embark on this journey with us. Together, we can scale new heights. Let's connect, collaborate, and make your vision a reality.
Tenzing.specialties: ['Private Equity, Buyouts, Growth, Mid-Market Private Equity, and Investing']

15below.description:
15below specialises in personalised passenger communications for the travel industry.  

Our messaging platform helps airlines, rail and travel companies stay connected with their passengers – from booking to arrivals and beyond. Whether it’s managing disruption or sending personalised booking confirmations, mobile boarding passes or flight status updates, we provide the systems and workflows to send tailored, real-time notifications to millions of travellers. Helping you to stay calm and in control.

To find out more about how SWISS, Ryanair, JetBlue and 60+ other customers use our system, or what we could do for you, please get in touch.
15below.specialties: ['Travel, Airline, Communication, Disruption, IT, Software, Rail, Travel Technology, and Automation']

Olio.description:
Olio is a sharing movement for businesses and local communities, on a mission to fight waste 🌍

Together with our network of 100k+ trained volunteers, we’ve rescued over 125 million meals from 8k+ locations, and shared over 15 million household items. 

📈 FOR BUSINESSES

We offer four solutions to help maximise revenue, eliminate edible waste and support local communities. Go for all four, or pick just a few: 

Sell more reduced items with:

📲 Reductions Feed: Show your discounts to thousands of local Olio users with our live Reductions Feed, so more food sells (instead of sitting on shelves).

🛍️ Lucky Dip: Another cost-effective way to sell more discounted food. Users reserve bags on our app and pay in-store, so money goes straight into your tills.
Share unsold food with:

👭 Our Charity Redistribution Platform:  Manage all your charity donations in Olio’s Charity Redistribution Platform, giving you a central system for collection scheduling, monitoring and end-to-end reporting.

🦸‍♀️ Our Food Waste Heroes Programme: Share surplus food via Olio’s own network of Food Waste Hero volunteers, who’ll collect it and redistribute it (in as little as 30 minutes) to families nearby.

Trusted by over 8k business locations including Tesco, Iceland, Asda, Central Coop, Boots and more.

👭 FOR PEOPLE

Olio makes it easy to pass on the things you no longer need to your local community - from food to furniture, clothes and books. 

Take a photo of your item → add it to the app →  wait for someone to request and collect it 🤝

Download the app on the App Store or Google Play today 📲

First Mile.description:
First Mile are one of London's greenest recycling & waste management companies, helping over 30,000 businesses reduce their carbon impact with a range of recycling & commercial waste services.

We’re the first waste management company in London to become B Corp Certified.

Our tailored approach to recycling & waste management offers reliable & flexible rubbish collection, waste removal, & recycling services at competitive prices with 24/7 support. Our rubbish removal & waste management services range from zero-to-landfill general waste & recycling to specialist recycling services such as confidential waste & secure shredding.

Join over 30,000 London businesses reducing their carbon impact with our reliable waste collections, 24/7 support & a range of rubbish recycling services.
First Mile.specialties: ['Recycling Services, Commercial Waste Management, Commercial Recycling, Paper Recycling, Glass Recycling, Plastics Recycling, Electronics Recycling, Batteries Recycling, Textile Recycling, Coffee Cups Recycling, Coffee Grounds Recycling, Mixed Recycling, Food Recycling, Paper Shredding, Clearances, Toner Recycling, Cartridges Recycling, KeyKegs Recycling, Waste Manangement, Circular Economy Service, Net Zero, Carbon Reduction, Net Zero Strategy, Green Waste Services, Zero to Landfill, and Carbon Reporting']

Goal Systems.description:
We are a company specialized in the development and roll-out of advanced IT systems applying optimization techniques to achieve better profitability, sustainability and competitiveness for our clients through the optimum scheduling and structuring of their resources.

The history and development of Goal Systems is fruit of our exclusive dedication to optimisation and to the trust that our clients have placed in us and our solutions. Thanks to our clients, we are now consolidated as an international leader in the design and production of resource optimisation products for transportation.

Since the beginning we have completed numerous optimisation projects in different countries and cultures, but always on the basis of our strategy for technological innovation and have gained over this time a very wide range of experience in the design of systems for optimum resource planning processes.

Our solutions are based on cutting-edge optimisation technology which have succeeded in solving some of the most complicated problems in resource planning. This technology has led to an increase in productivity and profitability, and as a consequence our clients have been able to achieve their objectives of service and quality.
Goal Systems.specialties: ['optimization software, scheduling, transport planning, and Intelligenttransportsystems']

Hitachi Rail.description:
Hitachi Rail is committed to driving a sustainable mobility transition and helping every passenger, customer and community enjoy more connected, seamless and sustainable transport.
Hitachi Rail is a trusted partner to operators around the world with expertise across every part of the rail ecosystems – from manufacture and maintenance of rolling stock to digital signalling and smart operational systems.
In FY23, the company had revenues of €7bn with 24,000 employees across over 50 countries, and it invests in its diverse and talented teams.
Drawing on the wider Hitachi group companies, Hitachi Rail furthers the development of digital innovation and new technologies to help pioneer resilient and sustainable solutions.
Hitachi Rail.specialties: ['Rolling Stock, Signalling, Digital Solutions, Innovation, Turnkey Projects, Operations, Service and Maintenance, Manufacturing, Mass Transit, Freight, Public Transportation, and smart mobility']

Masabi.description:
At Masabi we’re driving the fare payment revolution - together, we are improving the transit of millions to enable seamless travel for all.

Our own journeys are important too. Here, you have the tools to build the career you want. Whether you’re taking the direct route or trying new paths, we’ll be there to support you no matter what.

We are grateful to be a network of innovators from all walks of life; a group of passionate individuals who consistently deliver. Masabi is going places and our teams are in the driving seat. 

But, developing ground-breaking technology isn’t an easy ride - mistakes are inevitable. Our close connections keep us on the path to success. No matter your cargo, we share the load.

Masabi: Powering Journeys
Masabi.specialties: ['ticketing, transport ticketing, mobile ticketing, mtickets, Account-Based Ticketing, Open Payments, Fare Payments-as-a-Service, Fare Collection, AFC, Software Development, and Automated Fare Collection']

Jellycat.description:
Born in London. Loved worldwide.

For a quarter of a century, we have shared the joy of Jellycat toys with
people of all ages, across the globe. Over this time, our unmistakeable
characters have gained the affection of millions – and centre stage in
many of the most prestigious stores across 77 countries.

We have also become a major trendsetter on social media, featured in
billions of hashtags. Today, we stand among the most loved and
respected soft toy companies in the world.

What makes us different? Playfulness and luxurious quality.

Our designers play until something magical and unexpected happens –
and a new character is born! We source beautiful materials that are
noticeably softer, subtler and long-lasting.

Our HQ, Jellycat Studios, is based in central London and from there we
spread joy through toys, accessories, books, music, films and social
media. We have two other main studios in Minneapolis and Shanghai.

Explore the Jellycat world at Jellycat.com
Jellycat.specialties: ['Soft toys, Books, Gifts, and Baby toys']

Wiremind.description:
Founded in 2014 and headquartered in Paris, Wiremind offers advanced inventory, distribution, and optimization solutions for the passenger transportation, air cargo, and sports & events industries. Our goal is to unleash the power of AI and help drive success for our clients by simplifying and optimizing their commercial strategy.

We have applied our expertise to a diverse range of projects, including optimizing bus company revenues, forecasting passenger demand in the railway sector, managing air cargo capacity for airlines, and optimizing ticket sales for football clubs.

Our solutions, used by industry leaders in France and abroad, leverage both artificial and human intelligence to handle vast amounts of data, ensuring business value and an exceptional user experience.
Wiremind.specialties: ['Revenue Optimization, Yield Management, Transportation, Data science, Software Engineering, Railway Industry, Airlines, Bus industry, Air Cargo, Air Freight, Cargo, Freight, Pricing, Revenue Management, Demand Prediction, Competition Tracking, Data Visualization, Business Intelligence, Artificial Intelligence, AI, and Deep Learning']

Estate Search.description:
Estatesearch are committed to building data and technology services to help legal professionals support bereaved or vulnerable clients. We also campaign alongside professional membership bodies for improved vulnerable customer journeys among financial institutions. 

Our award winning Financial Profile Service is a combined asset and liability search to help Executors, Administrators, Deputies & Attorneys undertake a comprehensive and efficient search for all estate accounts. Providing reassurance and peace of mind. 

Alongside our Financial Profile Service our cloud based platform integrates with leading third-party services, simplifying you processes and providing access to a range of searches and services all in one dashboard, 

For further information or to arrange a demo visit our website.
Estate Search.specialties: ['Mental Capacity, Estate Administration, Financial Profile, Deputyship, Bereavement, Credit & Liabilities, Insurance, Court of Protection, Legal Technology, and Probate']

Swiftly.description: Swiftly is the leading transit data platform for agencies to share real-time passenger information, manage day-to-day operations, and improve service performance. Today, over 200 transit agencies in 12 countries—including LA Metro, MARTA, SEPTA, MBTA, and WMATA—rely on Swiftly to improve on-time performance by up to 40%, increase passenger information accuracy by up to 50%, and analyze transit data 90% faster. The result is better service reliability, increased ridership, and more efficient transit operations.
Swiftly.specialties: ['transportation, public transportation, transit, real-time passenger information, smart cities, government innovation, mobility, and urban mobility']

Pooky.description: Pooky is all about beautiful, decorative lighting.

Oddbox.description:
Good food doing good. 

Proud B Corp delivering rescued fruit, veg and more – make a difference with every box.
Oddbox.specialties: ['fruit box delivery, veg box delivery, ecommerce, online retail, sustainability, BCorp, and climate']

Maeving.description:
We Are Maeving. 
 
Maeving are a British maker of electric motorcycles. 
 
Our bikes are classically styled and practical machines that channel the best of British motorcycle design heritage into a new type of electric vehicle. Faster and safer than e-bikes or e-scooters, they are made for you, for the city, and for the planet.
 
Maeving’s bikes feature removable batteries that you can charge from any UK plug socket, making it easy to ‘re-fuel’ and bringing an end to range anxiety. We’re making a future where your electric motorcycle is charged at your desk at work, not in your garage.
 
We provide an end-to-end experience through www.maeving.com, ensuring that our customers get the best from their bikes by buying direct from us, the makers. We deliver to you for free, and service your bike at your door, making the buying and owning experience fuss-free. No dealer networks, no nonsense.
 
Our motorcycles allow our customers to achieve zero-emission personal transport and have the potential to radically transform our cities, making them cleaner, quieter, and healthier. 
 
And finally, they’re priced to save the world too – because they need to make sense to make a difference.
 
We Are Maeving. We Make Progress.

Precede.description: Precede Capital is a specialist in real estate credit, deploying institutional capital to finance exceptional residential and commercial development projects across the UK. We are a B Corp certified organisation.
Precede.specialties: ['Real Estate Finance, Structured Finance, Real estate development, Housing, PBSA, Retirement Living, and Build to Rent']

Arrow Global.description:
Arrow is a leading European vertically integrated alternative asset manager specialising in private credit and real estate.
Arrow was founded in 2005 by Zach Lewy, CEO, CIO, with the ambition of creating Europe’s leading private credit and real estate investment platform. Today, we deliver best-in-class risk-adjusted returns for global investors across real estate, direct lending, and opportunistic credit. Arrow’s hallmark is to invest opportunistically, moving between European geographies, asset classes and positions in the capital stack as we evaluate evolving risk/return dynamics. To execute this strategy, Arrow has developed its geographic and asset-class expertise in its target markets.
We own critical parts of the European infrastructure which gives us a practical advantage when operating in fragmented European markets. Our best-in-class asset management and servicing platforms generate differentiated opportunities through a disciplined investing, underwriting insight and proprietary dealflow. This vertically integrated advantage allows us to create sustainable value through market cycles.
Arrow’s local advantage is underpinned by 4,400 talented professionals who are deeply connected to our local markets. We have brought together leading practitioners, both locally and centrally, in the European credit and real estate, and our diverse workforce means we build meaningful connections in these markets through our investments. 
Our teams are experts in their chosen fields, and our specialist teams cover areas such as development finance, non-performing loans, single name bankruptcy, corporate restructuring, bridge and agricultural lending, and small business loans. Our local advantage also extends to our unrivalled origination network, forensic underwriting, and portfolio management. 
With the added benefit of key European regulatory licences, we service approximately €112 billion of AUM.

Octopus Electric Vehicles.description: Get the car, charger and energy, all from one place

Kerbo Charge.description:
Do you have no off-street parking, but want to charge your electric car at home without trailing a cable across the pavement? Kerbo charge makes this possible!

The problem with public charging points is that they can be around 5 times more expensive than domestic charging tariffs.

For a typical car user, charging only once per week, this works out at more than £800 additional annual cost if you have to use public chargers all the time, compared to charging at home.

This is why we've created Kerbo Charge, a charging cable channel that allows residents to safely charge at home without the issue of tripping hazards.

The channel is installed between the front of a resident’s property and the kerb, and self closes when released, and sits completely flush with the pavement.

Accessibility and simplicity for all EV owners.
Kerbo Charge.specialties: ['electric vehicles, electric cars, cable channel, and cable gully']

Cubic Transportation.description:
Cubic creates and delivers technology solutions in transportation that make people’s lives easier by simplifying their daily journeys, and defense capabilities that help promote mission success and safety for those who serve their nation. Led by our talented teams around the world, Cubic is driven to solve global challenges through innovation and service to our customers and partners.

We have a leading portfolio of businesses, including Cubic Transportation Systems (CTS) and Cubic Defense. 

Impressum: https://www.cubic.com/legal/impressum
Cubic Transportation.specialties: ['Global Defense, Transportation Systems, Mission Solutions (C4ISR), Technology, Innovation, and Engineering']

OpenPlay.description:
OpenPlay's purpose is build Technology for a Healthier World. We want to provide the digital tools that integrate with tech innovators, to access local active communities and build personalised positive health behaviours.

Our journey began 10 years ago developing a marketplace for people to find and book sports facilities. Soon realising the industry was calling out for disruption, our health technology solution evolved to create an ecosystem that mobilises populations to get active and live a healthy life. The appetite continues to grow, and we now power a range of operators, educators and communities across the globe!
OpenPlay.specialties: ['Sports Management, Sports Technology, CRM, Health Technology, Online Booking, Mobile, User Experience, Innovation, Membership Management, Community Activation, and Facility Management']

Orbian.description:
Founded by SAP and Citibank in 1999, we are today the leading provider of payables solutions. With the broadest product range in payables solutions, we help global leading companies to improve their working capital. Our proprietary Bank Pool funding structure is established with leading global banks and provides the most scalable, resilient financing solution with a global reach.

Our solutions for working capital optimisation range from various Supply Chain Finance to Payment with Terms solutions that offer extended payment terms to our clients.
Orbian.specialties: ['Supply Chain Finance, Reverse Factoring, Payables Finance, and Working Capital']

Freddie's Flowers.description:
Freddie’s Flowers is a fast-growing direct-to-consumer flower business based in the UK and Germany. It all started with Freddie Garland delivering weekly flowers to his Mum & Dad’s neighbours back in 2015 in a knackered old milk float. Our wonderful team is now delivering thousands of boxes every day, but Freddie’s original idea hasn’t changed - to change people’s relationship with flowers. We want to bring the happiness and joy of arranging and experiencing your own flowers into everyone’s home, and in a way that has as little environmental impact as possible - we’re now a B Corp certified, proving that our love for flowers goes hand-in-hand with our love for the planet. 

The secret to our success is: 

We love what we do and we know what the plan is. 
We work hard to do it brilliantly. 
We have fun working together.

Amadeus.description:
We make the experience of travel better for everyone, everywhere by inspiring innovation, partnerships and responsibility to people, places and planet.

Our technology powers the travel and tourism industry. 

We inspire more connected ways of thinking, centered around the traveler. 

Our platform connects the travel and hospitality ecosystem. We are making travel a force for social and environmental good. 

We are passionate about travel. With a unique perspective, at the heart of our industry, we are redesigning the travel of tomorrow.

Wescot.description:
Wescot is a UK based debt collection agency. We work on behalf of a number of banking, utility, telecoms and retail finance companies whose customers have fallen behind with their repayments. These companies pass accounts to Wescot to manage and we work with each individual customer to establish affordable and sustainable repayment arrangements for the debt. 

We are authorised and regulated by the UK Financial Conduct Authority. We are a member of the Credit Services Association and are proud to be at the forefront in helping to shape best practice standards for the industry.

The Private Office.description:
The Private Office is one of the UK’s Top 25 Financial Planning Companies acting for more than 2400 individuals, families, businesses and trusts to provide wealth management, financial planning solutions and independent financial advice.

We offer tailored planning across a breadth of sectors and services, including:
•	Personal Financial Planning
•	Structural Financial Planning
•	Long-term Care Planning
•	Expert / Professional Witness Cases
•	Clinical Negligence / Catastrophic Personal Injury Planning
•	Corporate Financial Planning
•	Employee Benefits / Automatic Enrolment
•	UK & Specialist Pension Planning
•	Investment Portfolio Management
•	Alternative and Esoteric Investments
•	Tax, Estate and Inheritance Tax (IHT) Planning
•	Charity Investment Management
•	Legacy and Succession Planning
•	Entrepreneurial Planning
•	Media, Music and Entertainment

Our team of independent financial advisers specialise in helping clients create, sustain, protect and grow wealth.  In October 2016 The Private Office acquired PQR Financial Planning strengthening its London presence.  We are also in the process of establishing a permanent presence in Bath.

The Private Office is, and always has been, fully independent. This means that we operate without restriction and without bias or affiliation to any product or provider on the market.

For further information about the firm please visit our website www.theprivateoffice.com or contact us on 0333 323 9060.

Connect with us:
Website: www.theprivateoffice.com

Please note: The Financial Conduct Authority does not regulate Tax Advice or Estate Planning.
The value of investments can fall as well as rise. You may not get back what you invest.
The Private Office.specialties: ['Independent Financial Advice, Wealth Management, Personal Financial Planning, Structural Financial Planning, Clinical Negligence / Personal Injury Planning, Corporate Financial Planning, UK & Specialist Pension Planning, IHT Planning, Legacy & Succession Planning, and Employee Benefits & Automatic Enrolment']

Previsico.description: Previsico are surface water flood forecasting specialists enabling people and organisations to minimise the impact of flooding. Backed by Foresight Group and underpinned by two decades of research at Loughborough University, Previsico’s world leading solution is used by insurers, businesses and government to reduce their losses. Our mission is to be the leading global provider of cutting-edge flood prediction that saves lives and livelihoods whilst significantly reducing the cost of flooding. Having launched in January, 2019, we have a growing team of 40 people with offices in Loughborough, London and the US.
Previsico.specialties: ['Flood Forecasting, Flood Nowcasting, Business Continuity, Disaster Risk Reduction, Flood alerts, Insurtech, Flood Resilience, Loss Mitigation, Early Warning, Flood Modelling, Earth Observation, Sensor Development, GIS, Risk management, and Insurance']

Recorra.description:
Recorra is redefining commercial waste management and recycling for businesses across London and the South East. ♻️

With over 35 years of experience, we provide sustainable waste management, circular economy services, and expert consultancy to help thousands of businesses reduce waste, improve efficiency, and achieve their sustainability goals.

From recycling and waste collection to circular economy strategies and ESG-focused consultancy, we support businesses in creating sustainable operations that align with both corporate responsibility and operational success.

At Recorra, we combine innovation, expertise, and local knowledge to deliver actionable solutions for businesses of all sizes. Join the recycling revolution, reduce your environmental footprint, and partner with a team committed to transforming commercial waste management into a sustainable, efficient, and future-ready service.
Recorra.specialties: ['Office recycling, Zero to Landfill waste collections, Office supplies and stationery, Waste audits, Staff engagement and training, Recycling bins, Food waste recycling, WEEE recycling, Secure Data Destruction, Sustainability, Recycling, London, and Environmental']

Flight Club.description:
We’ve taken the traditional game of darts and supercharged it for the 21st century by developing a range of fast and exciting multiplayer games. All housed in an incredible venue with a breath-taking bar where outstanding food and drink is served to you as you play. Welcome to the home of Social Darts® 

With venues located across London, Birmingham and Manchester; we build incredible events to effortlessly bring groups as small as 6 or as large as 650 together. Whether you’re entertaining clients, celebrating a company milestone or launching a new product, we can tailor the Flight Club experience to suit your exact needs. With the ability to host team or individual tournaments led by our Gamesmasters we promise you a social event like no other.

Food and Drinks packages
Our food & drinks packages have been designed to offer the perfect balance for a great event. With a selection of vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free options, there’s something for everyone.
Flight Club.specialties: ['Drinks, Food, Social entertainment, Social Darts, and teambuilding']

Evolution Money.description:
At Evolution Money, we provide secured homeowner loans for UK homeowners, with borrowing from £5,000 to £105,000. Our approach focuses on responsible lending, transparency and tailored solutions for each customer. 

Every loan we provide supports a clear purpose. Many customers use a secured loan to consolidate existing debts into one manageable repayment. Others fund improvements to their homes. In every case, we focus on providing a loan that suits the customer’s circumstances. 

Since launching in 2011, we have taken a personal approach to lending. As a specialist secured lender, we look at each application individually to ensure the loan is suitable and affordable. 

Customer feedback plays an important role in how we improve our service. We encourage every customer to share their experience, which has helped us achieve an Exceptional rating on Feefo, alongside the Feefo Platinum Trusted Service Award and recognition as Best Secured Loan Provider at the Consumer Credit Awards. 

We work closely with brokers and introducers across the UK to support homeowners who may not meet the criteria of mainstream lenders. Our Business Development Managers support partners throughout the process, with a dedicated broker portal to access customer details, upload documents and request new quotes. 

As a B Corp certified company, we balance commercial success with a wider responsibility to people and communities through responsible lending and community initiatives.

SeatFrog.description:
The only app where you can buy train tickets, upgrade to First Class, change train times and much more. Join over 1.5 million customers who have saved £62 million with the app that's made for the world you live in.

We're on a mission to build a better future for Rail and its billions of passengers, for good.

Find out more:
https://seatfrog.com
SeatFrog.specialties: ['Mobile platforms, User experience design, Data science, Behavioural strategy, Travel technology, and Train Technology']

Neptune.description:
Neptune - Kitchens and interiors, designed with timeless style and enduring quality—built to last a lifetime.

At Neptune we believe that good design never grows old, and that's why we’re on a mission to make furniture that lasts for 100 years and beyond. We first started out in 1996 and now have over 35 stores across the UK and Europe. As we continue to grow, we’re always on the lookout for great people to be part of our journey. 

Just as we believe good design improves our customers’ lives, so our workspaces are designed for the wellbeing of our employees. Our unique support office in Blagrove, Swindon is both a hive of activity and a beautifully decorated, tranquil environment. We’re fortunate to have our own warehouse, distribution, and production teams, based at our support office and a short distance away at our second location, Groundwell. 

We are nothing without our stores, which reach from Hove up to York – and across the channel. Each one is home to its own dedicated team, who maintain stunning surroundings for both staff and customers. Whether you’re based in Blagrove, at Groundwell, or in one of our stores, you will always feel connected to the wider Neptune team.  

Bringing lots of different viewpoints and experiences under one roof is key to our success, so we welcome applicants from all backgrounds. Employee benefits include discounts across our collections, generous holiday to rest and recharge, and access to exclusive Perkbox offers. 

View our current vacancies at https://www.neptune.com/pages/careers

Secret Food Tours.description:
We are truly passionate about showcasing mouthwatering and irresistible secret foods from all corners of the globe.

Every year, our experienced, local, foodie guides show hundreds of thousands of people the best and most delicious foods a city has to offer. Each tour is fun, highly rated, and completely unique to its destination — no two tours are the same.

We take great pride in highlighting the best secret bites loved by locals and overlooked by tourists. Our tours have over 100,000 5-star reviews across our 120+ cities worldwide, so we know you'll love them too.

Learn about each city's history, how locals buy food, and how food has shaped the area's culture. All our tours feature a special Secret Dish selected by our guides that you can only find out about on the tour, with drink upgrades available as well.

Perfect for all ages and all occasions, we can't wait to share with you all of our in-the-know secrets. An authentic, unforgettable experience that will leave you full and happy.

OSB.description:
With a central mission to provide fair financial solutions to all, OSB Group is a specialist lending and retail savings group serving the UK, Jersey and Guernsey, and is authorised by the PRA, part of the Bank of England, and regulated by the FCA.

With a heritage dating back over 150 years, OSB floated on the London Stock Exchange in June 2014 and joined the FTSE 250 one year later. 

2019 marked an exciting period of growth with the combination of OSB and Charter Court Financial Services, taking The Groups individual brands to 13, including Kent Reliance, Precise, InterBay, Heritable Development Finance, and Charter Savings Bank.

OSB Group focuses its specialist lending activities on selected sub-sectors of the lending market in which it has an established presence and expertise. These include private rented sector buy to let, commercial and semi-commercial mortgages, residential development finance, bespoke and specialist residential lending, secured funding lines and asset finance.

Predominantly funded by retail savings originated through online and direct channels, The Group originates almost all of its organic lending through specialist intermediaries. It’s differentiated through its use of highly skilled, bespoke underwriting and efficient operating model.

The majority of the Group’s administrative support functions are performed by its wholly owned operations in Bangalore, India.

Bolt6.description: We’re building the future of sport. Bolt6 is a sports technology company at the forefront of visual innovation – from real-time tracking and data overlays, to immersive broadcast graphics and AR experiences. We work across tennis, golf, motorsport, volleyball, and more; partnering with rights holders and broadcasters to elevate how sport is seen, understood, and enjoyed.
Bolt6.specialties: ['Computer Vision, Deep Learning, Distributed Systems, Sports Technology, and Broadcast Technology']

Desucla.description:
Desucla's mission is to simplify global tax and payment compliance for businesses and partners through intelligent, reliable technology. 

We remove the operational tax risk, delays, and complexity that slow down cross-border expansion. Teams get faster market entry, guaranteed settlement, and automated VAT/DST that’s built to treasury and governance standards. 

What we do 
- Fiscal Representation: Centralised, compliant local representation with standardised processes and full risk management. 
- Submission: Expert-led filings, notifications, and continuous local engagement to ensure accurate, on-time compliance. 
- Tax Payment: Treasury-grade payment solutions covering all tax types and payout methods, accelerating cycles and reducing exposure. 
- Trade Facilitation: Integrated tax and customs workflows for efficient, compliant goods movement across borders. 

Who we support 
- CFO buying committees, compliance partners, tax and treasury leaders, and global operators who need certainty, visibility, and control, not more complexity. 

Why businesses choose Desucla 
- We unify execution + settlement + compliance 
- We eliminate avoidable tax exposure through automation 
- We guarantee clearance and simplify cross-border workflows 
- We deliver enterprise-grade governance and reliability 

Desucla makes global expansion safer, faster, and fully compliant, so your business can scale with confidence.
Desucla.specialties: ['VAT, TAX, VAT Payments, EU VAT, Customs, TradeFlow, Fiscal Representation, and IOSS']

Spoke.description:
SPOKE is a vertically integrated online menswear brand. 

We use an e-commerce model to give men exactly what they're looking for: properly made clothes that really fit, without the luxury markup. 

Our clothes are cut in more sizes, from the very best fabric and trim - then sold direct to the consumer, at a sane price. Find us at www.spoke-london.com.

SenSat.description: Sensat is a geospatial AI business that powers advanced and highly functional digital twins for the construction, engineering and critical infrastructure industries.
SenSat.specialties: ['Software, SaaS, Construction, Infrastructure, artificial intelligence, Civil Infrastructure, and Construction Technology']
